entities.name: NONCULTIVATION
entities.description: The state of keeping land uncultivated due to various social, economic, and natural reasons

entities.name: SOCIAL REASONS
entities.description: Social factors that contribute to farmers keeping land uncultivated

entities.name: ECONOMIC REASONS
entities.description: Economic factors that contribute to farmers keeping land uncultivated

entities.name: NATURAL REASONS
entities.description: Natural factors that contribute to farmers keeping land uncultivated

entities.name: KHATIJAPURA
entities.description: A region where water scarcity, labor scarcity, and traditional practices lead to noncultivation

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water for agricultural cultivation

entities.name: LABOR SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of available labor for agricultural activities

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The autumn cropping season during which noncultivation occurs in Khatijapura

entities.name: TRADITIONAL PRACTICE
entities.description: Customary practices that influence the decision not to cultivate land

entities.name: DALIPARRU
entities.description: A region where land conversion and urban migration are primary reasons for noncultivation

entities.name: LAND CONVERSION
entities.description: The intention to convert agricultural land to non-agricultural use

entities.name: URBAN MIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of people from rural areas to urban areas

entities.name: JARASINGHA
entities.description: A region where water scarcity is the primary reason for leaving land vacant
